description.value:
• Action Cost: 1 [Combat] action
  • Range: 30 feet
  • Frequency: Once per short rest
  • Effect: Target within 30 feet makes [[/save type=will]] (your Charisma + Fire Mastery vs their Wisdom + Luck). If you win by 1+ successes, target is Frightened for 1 minute (they can repeat save each turn). The stolen power within you manifests as pure terror.

system.effect: Target within 30 feet makes Will save (your Charisma + Fire Mastery vs their Wisdom + Luck). If you win by 1+ successes, target is Frightened for 1 minute (they can repeat save each turn). The stolen power within you manifests as pure terror.
